tweets.text: Despite the surrounding narrative of AI being the dominant driver of the year-to-date gains, the Advance-Decline Line still went on to make new highs this past week even with the S&P remaining off the highs given the recent momentum unwind, emphasizing the overall pickup in upside participation & on top of that, Equal-Weight is now outperforming the S&P on the year by nearly 200bps.
tweets.full_text: Despite the surrounding narrative of AI being the dominant driver of the year-to-date gains, the Advance-Decline Line still went on to make new highs this past week even with the S&P remaining off the highs given the recent momentum unwind, emphasizing the overall pickup in upside participation & on top of that, Equal-Weight is now outperforming the S&P on the year by nearly 200bps.
